classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为尺寸图中的局部结构放大视图，包含圆孔、中心线、引出线和尺寸标注'B1h9'、'D5深(depth)L9'、'H1'，用于描述键槽宽度、公差及孔深等机械安装尺寸。

title.title_zh: 键槽与孔深尺寸局部图
title.title_en: Keyway and Hole Depth Detail Dimensions

text_annotations.correction_note: Merged adjacent callout parts D5 and (depth)L9 into one hole depth annotation.

terminology_notes: D5 and L9 are symbolic dimension parameters rather than numeric values.
h9 is an ISO tolerance class designation attached to B1.

dimension_records.reason: Vertical dimension callout B1h9 is associated with the slot/keyway feature on the side of the circular shaft-end view.
D5 and (depth)L9 are visually connected by the same leader line to the central drilled feature and form one hole specification.
Horizontal dimension H1 measures the lower span of the shaft-end feature in the same view.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Visible shaft-end detail includes B1h9 keyway-related dimension and H1 shaft-end span.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric values for B1, D5, L9, and H1 are not specified in the visible crop; they likely refer to dimensional table parameters.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
